title: ½ Krone - Christian IV (Open crown; standing King type)

obverse.description: Crowned king standing right, holding scepter with right hand; the other hand is on sword pommel. (The scepter is horizontal at hip size, instead of vertical on the shoulder as Km# 58) King's figure is inside a rope or beaded circle, while legend is outside.
obverse.lettering_translation: Christian IV (King of) Denmark by the grace of God

reverse.description:
High crown over R.F.P. Date above crown, with numbers divided by crown's points; all within pearled circle.
Legend outside around rim, with mintmark at the beginning.
reverse.lettering:
NORVEG • VANDALO • GOTORU • Q • REX ☘
• 1 • 6 • Z • 4 •
• R • F • P • (= REGNA FIRMAT PIETAS)
reverse.lettering_translation:
King of Norway, the Wends and the Goths
Piety strengthens the realms
